ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_types" (
  "constant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant type */,
  "constant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the constant type */,
  "constant_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the constant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "research_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "research_area_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constants" (
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the constant */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "constant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant type */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Description of what the constant represents */,
  "declared_where" TEXT /* Location where the constant is declared (e.g., source code file) */,
  "quantified_where" TEXT /* Location where the constant is quantified or used in calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constants_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constants_constant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_type_id") REFERENCES constant_types ("constant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose */,
  "equation" TEXT /* Mathematical equation of the model */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name where the model is implemented */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication where the model is described */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_tags" (
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_tags" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., 'uses', 'is_part_of') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_research_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the constant */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant being versioned */,
  "version_value" REAL /* Value of the constant in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_versions_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., source code, documentation) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_research_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., literature, experiment, simulation) */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was published or generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id")
)
